title: myagrum prostratum
intro: Myagrum prostratum, also known as Creeping Myagrum, is a type of flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Myagrum prostratum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Myagrum prostratum can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
